title: 3D Printed Face Shield with Closed Top
author: Julia Rossmanith

steps_raw.instruction: Print the head part of the face shield with the 3D printer. Visera_Fija_Cerrada_v0.4_con_autolock.stl
Place the overhead transparency or laminated laminating foil on the head part.
Put a strap through both ends of the head part of the shield to fix it on your head.
